scripts.mac:build: rm -rf build-gateway-mac && cmake -S gateway/platform/macos -B build-gateway-mac && cmake --build build-gateway-mac
scripts.bitaxe:flash: curl 'http://10.70.0.28/api/system/OTA' -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/octet-stream' --data-binary @build/esp-miner.bin; sleep 10 && curl 'http://10.70.0.28/api/system/OTAWWW' -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/octet-stream' --data-binary @build/www.bin
scripts.bitaxe:dev: pnpm run bitaxe:build && pnpm run bitaxe:copy && pnpm run bitaxe:flash
